_readme: KELEDON autonomous task queue — optimized for Claude Sonnet 4.6. Read fully before touching any file.

session_state.last_completed: Brain Fix v0.1.18 COMPLETE — Electron-native automation, progress reporting, log fix, installer cleanup
session_state.next_action: Promote B-001: Release Ops plan, OR build+smoke-test v0.1.18 installer

active_plan.name: Brain Fix & Integration
active_plan.goal: Fix CDP/BrowserView automation in autobrowse-bridge, enhance goal mapper, add progress reporting, fix logs, fix installer size.

tasks.title: Fix CDP Connection - use Electron APIs directly for BrowserView control
tasks.what: Replace playwright CDP connection with direct Electron BrowserView APIs: webContents.loadURL for navigation, executeJavaScript for DOM manipulation, capturePage for screenshots. Keep Playwright only as fallback.
tasks.acceptance: Goals that navigate to URLs actually load in the BrowserView. Goals that click/fill actually manipulate the page DOM.
guardrails: No Google Generative AI API - Ollama/OpenAI only

tasks.title: Enhance Goal Mapper with Better Pattern Matching
tasks.what: Expand mapGoalToActions() to handle: 'go to [domain]', 'login to [vendor]', 'click the [button]', 'fill [field] with [value]', 'search for [query]', 'extract [data]', 'scroll down/up', 'take a screenshot'. Add URL auto-detection.
tasks.acceptance: Natural language goals map to correct actions without regex failures

tasks.title: Add Progress Reporting to Renderer
tasks.what: Emit executor:progress IPC events during goal execution. Renderer already has onProgress listener - bridge just needs to emit. Show step status in renderer UI.
tasks.acceptance: When a goal executes, renderer shows step-by-step progress in real-time

tasks.title: Fix Logs - lazy initialization of log paths
tasks.what: Replace module-load-time LOGS_DIR with getLogsDir() getter that initializes lazily inside app.whenReady(). Fall back to os.tmpdir() if app not ready.
tasks.acceptance: After app starts, logs appear in %APPDATA%/KELEDON Browser/logs/ immediately. If app crashes early, early logs go to os.tmpdir().

tasks.title: Fix Installer Size - pre-build cleanup script
tasks.what: Add pre_dist script that deletes old installers and win-unpacked before building. Create clean-dist.js cleanup script.
tasks.acceptance: Installer size drops from 1.8GB back to ~150-200MB

tasks.title: Version Bump to 0.1.18
tasks.what: Bump all packages to 0.1.18. Update launch-keledon page version.
tasks.acceptance: All packages report 0.1.18, GitHub release created

tasks.title: Build and Smoke Test
tasks.what: Build installer, verify size, run installer, verify app starts with logs
tasks.acceptance: Build succeeds, installer ~150-200MB, app runs, logs appear

backlog.title: Release Ops: branch hygiene + CI skeleton
backlog.notes: 5 phases: branch pruning, release automation, Windows signing, E2E testing, docs spine.

backlog.title: WebRTC + RPA Voice Integration
backlog.notes: 4 phases: WebRTC media layer, Cloud decision loop, RPA automation, Agent participation.

context.canonical_loop: Scan -> Claim -> Plan -> Execute -> Commit -> Push -> PR -> Report -> Scan
global_guardrails: Cloud decides, Browser executes. Never add decision logic to browser/.
Never modify docs/specs/ without a governance Issue.
Never declare completion without a PR.
NO Google Generative AI API - Ollama/OpenAI only
